entry.title: New: RES25-242 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO AUTHORIZE THE DEPARTMENT OF THE CORPORATION COUNSEL TO INITIATE LEGAL ACTION AGAINST ANGELO’S AUTO BODY & DETAILING, LLC, ANGELO S. JOHN, IN ALL OF HIS CAPACITIES (E.G. IN HIS CAPACITIES AS THE SOLE MEMBER-MANAGER OF THE LLC, TRUSTEE OF THE LLC’S TRUST, AND IN HIS PERSONAL CAPACITY) TO DEMOLISH AN UNSAFE STRUCTURE.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
